title: Lab 00 — Start (Scaffolding + Health Checks)
description:
Get the scaffold running, env files in place, and verify the expected 501 stubs before coding.

## What you should do
1. Run `pnpm env:setup` and `pnpm install -r`.
2. Start the services with `pnpm dev`.
3. Verify the issuer metadata endpoint responds.
4. Confirm the starter endpoints still return `501` until implemented.

## Submission and grading
- Work in your provisioned GitHub repository.
- Push regularly; GitHub Actions is the grading signal.
- Draft grades may appear before assigned grades are published.
